task: I’m trying to put together an all-black going-out outfit and want you to build it around a dress first so I can see whether the whole look feels cohesive. On Princess Polly, find a black short party dress in size Medium that’s actually available for delivery, open the product page so you can verify the size and delivery status, and leave that tab open because I want the dress to be the anchor piece. Then go to DemoniaCult and find a black Mary Jane shoe that would work with that dress, making sure size 9 or 9.5 is available on the actual product page, and open the best option in its own tab so I can compare the vibe side by side with the dress; please note exactly which of those sizes you found in stock. After that, go to Edikted and pick a dark brown leather oversized jacket without a hood to use as the outer layer, and open the actual product page so I can visually confirm it fits the look. At the end, send me a short outfit summary with the product names and links for all three items, include the dress and shoe prices, and mention the shoe size availability you found on DemoniaCult.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Princess Polly website and identified the "Landon Mini Dress Black". It verified the size Medium by checking the size guide (which maps Medium to US 6) and confirmed that US 6 was selectable and available for purchase. The agent captured the product name, price ($65.00), and the URL, and left the tab open as requested.

R2: success - The agent successfully identified and opened the Princess Polly dress page (Landon Mini Dress) in the first tab. Throughout the trajectory, the agent maintained this tab and explicitly referenced it as the "anchor piece" when selecting the shoes and jacket to ensure the outfit was cohesive. The final summary confirms the dress was used as the anchor for the outfit.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to the DemoniaCult product page for the "Gothika-09" Mary Jane platforms. In step 21, the agent explicitly stated that it verified size US 9 was selectable and in stock, and noted that 9.5 was not offered. The final summary provided in step 32 includes the product name, price ($73.95), link, and the specific size availability (US 9 in stock, 9.5 not offered). The rubric requirement is satisfied.

R4: success - The agent successfully navigated to the DemoniaCult product page for the "Gothika-09" Mary Jane platforms. Throughout the trajectory, the agent maintained multiple tabs, and the final step confirms that the DemoniaCult product page (tab index 1) remained open alongside the other items. The agent explicitly references this shoe as the selected pairing for the dress in the final summary.

R5: success - The agent successfully navigated to the Edikted product page for the "Jaxson Oversized Faux Leather Bomber Jacket" in dark brown. The product name and URL were captured and included in the final summary. The product page (as verified by the URL and the agent's description) shows an oversized bomber jacket, which is a style that does not have a hood. The agent fulfilled the requirement to identify the item and capture its details.

R6: success - The agent provided a final summary that includes all three items with their names and links. It includes the price for the Princess Polly dress ($65.00) and the DemoniaCult shoe ($73.95). It explicitly states the shoe size availability found (US 9 is in stock, 9.5 is not offered). The requirement is fully satisfied.
